title: StressNET: an adaptable deep-learning model for mechanical stress inference in tissues
description:
StressNET is an open-source Python library implementing the deep-learning architecture described in the associated research article on mechanical stress inference in biological tissues. The software repository accompanies the associated research article and provides training, evaluation, and inference utilities.

Associated article authors:
Nicolás Aldecoa Rodrigo*, Augusto Borges*, Jerónimo R. Miranda-Rodriguez, Guillherme Ventura, Jakub Sedzinski, Hernán López-Schier, and Osvaldo Chara.

*These authors contributed equally.
